name: Executable Specificity Dominance
oneSentenceClaim: A narrow executable claim can be safer than a broad well-documented claim if the executable behavior is specific and falsifiable.
whyExistingPrinciplesInsufficient: Existing concepts identify risk sources but do not predict dominance among falsifier access, resolution cost, executable specificity, and controls.
mechanism: specific executable predicate reduces interpretation space and exposes a direct false case
nonExamples: general package usefulness or broad benchmark win
falsificationTests: rival predicts observation with fewer caveats
